revision.text:
<includeonly>{{cite constitution/core
| amendment = {{{amendment|}}}
| article = {{{article|}}}
| section = {{{section|}}}
| clause = {{{clause|}}}
| polity = {{if empty|{{{polity|}}}|{{{country|}}}}}
| date = {{if empty|{{{date|}}}|{{{ratified|}}}}}
| url = {{{url|}}}
| website = {{if empty|{{{website|}}}|{{{work|}}}}}
| archive-url = {{if empty|{{{archive-url|}}}|{{{archiveurl|}}}}}
| archive-date = {{if empty|{{{archive-date|}}}|{{{archivedate|}}}}}
| access-date = {{if empty|{{{access-date|}}}|{{{accessdate|}}}}}
| via = {{{via|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

| amendment = {{{amendment|}}}
| article = {{{article|}}}
| section = {{{section|}}}
| clause = {{{clause|}}}
| polity = {{if empty|{{{polity|}}}|{{{country|}}}}}
| date = {{if empty|{{{date|}}}|{{{ratified|}}}}}
| url = {{{url|}}}
| website = {{if empty|{{{website|}}}|{{{work|}}}}}
| archive-url = {{if empty|{{{archive-url|}}}|{{{archiveurl|}}}}}
| archive-date = {{if empty|{{{archive-date|}}}|{{{archivedate|}}}}}
| access-date = {{if empty|{{{access-date|}}}|{{{accessdate|}}}}}
| via = {{{via|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_constitution here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_constitution for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<includeonly>{{cite constitution/core
| amendment = {{{amendment|}}}
| article = {{{article|}}}
| section = {{{section|}}}
| clause = {{{clause|}}}
| polity = {{if empty|{{{polity|}}}|{{{country|}}}}}
| date = {{if empty|{{{date|}}}|{{{ratified|}}}}}
| url = {{{url|}}}
| website = {{if empty|{{{website|}}}|{{{work|}}}}}
| archive-url = {{if empty|{{{archive-url|}}}|{{{archiveurl|}}}}}
| archive-date = {{if empty|{{{archive-date|}}}|{{{archivedate|}}}}}
| access-date = {{if empty|{{{access-date|}}}|{{{accessdate|}}}}}
| via = {{{via|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
